## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional Context

- Which component? [Backend / Desktop / Both]
- Which domain plugin? [Maritime / Traffic Law / General]
- Any relevant feature flags?
